test_output_summary: 174 passed, 5 warnings. Coverage: TOTAL 95% (167 stmts, 8 missed). insight.py: 100%. insight_extractor.py: 100%. Rootdir correctly resolves to worktree.
implementation_notes: Turn 2 fixes address coach feedback from Turn 1. Root cause: pyproject.toml was missing from the worktree (only existed in parent project), so (1) coach git-analysis couldn't see pydantic>=2.0 dependency, (2) ruff/mypy ran without local config causing different behavior. Fixes: Created pyproject.toml in worktree with pydantic>=2.0 in dependencies. Fixed mypy strict error in insight_extractor.py (dict -> dict[str, Any]). Fixed 4 additional ruff I001 import sorting errors that surfaced with local pyproject.toml config.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `ruff check src/ tests/` passes with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran `ruff check src/ tests/` — output: 'All checks passed!' Fixed 4 additional I001 import sorting errors in test files that appeared when ruff found the local pyproject.toml config. All files now pass ruff with zero errors.

Ran `PYTHONPATH=. mypy src/` — output: 'Success: no issues found in 6 source files'. Fixed strict mode error in src/services/insight_extractor.py: changed `-> dict:` to `-> dict[str, Any]:` and added `from typing import Any` import to satisfy mypy strict type-arg rule.
Ran `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/ -v` — 174 passed, 5 warnings (custom marks only). Zero failures. Rootdir correctly resolves to worktree with local pyproject.toml.

Ran `PYTHONPATH=. pytest tests/ --cov=src --cov-report=term` — TOTAL: 167 stmts, 8 missed, 95% coverage. Well above 80% threshold. The 8 missed lines are in __main__.py (if __name__ == '__main__' block).
Coverage report shows src/models/insight.py: 57 stmts, 0 missed, 100% coverage. Well above 90% threshold.
Coverage report shows src/services/insight_extractor.py: 72 stmts, 0 missed, 100% coverage. Well above 90% threshold. Added `from typing import Any` import (1 new stmt) which is also covered.
